text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin has been trying to master a more
controlled running style, but it's just not working
out, and she's fallen into a slump.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest we forget about it for now, but she
won't have it. She's determined to show her family
that she can stand tall after a race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Kikuka Sho arrives, and Ines Fujin
makes a rare work-related mistake.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she takes care of the issue and nothing
big comes of it, she's left shaken. For now, the
most I can do is lend her my full support.
